research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.

competent_reader_input.claim_text: Diltiazem is a benzothiazepine calcium-channel blocker (ICaL); cardiac effects mediated by L-type calcium channel modulation.

scorecard_calibration.rationale: ICaL framing is dominant; reader less likely to multi-current frame. SEALED for blind evaluation.
